_comment: Tier-2 for ngsolve helmholtz#: pml.Radial pybind11 signature is (origin, rad=1, alpha=1j) — origin is REQUIRED as positional or kwarg. The earlier catalog template at src/backends/ngsolve/generators/helmholtz.py L24 omitted origin and raised TypeError 'incompatible function arguments' at the Radial() call before mesh.SetPML was even reached. Fix shipped with origin=(0,0) for 2-D centered PML. Catalog falsification #26, found via the new ngsolve_source_scanner.py. Verified empirically against NGSolve 6.2.2604 on 2026-06-01.
